name: Sabalo (SS-302)
events: 29 Jun 1945 USS Sabalo (Lt.Cdr. J.G. Andrews, USN) departed Philadelphia, Pennsylvania for New London, Connecticut.
30 Jun 1945 USS Sabalo (Lt.Cdr. J.G. Andrews, USN) arrived at New London, Connecticut from Philadelphia, Pennsylvania.
27 Jul 1945 USS Sabalo (Lt.Cdr. J.G. Andrews, USN) was put on the slipway at New London, Connecticut.
3 Aug 1945 USS Sabalo (Lt.Cdr. J.G. Andrews, USN) was put back in the water.
